mapper.select: SELECT * FROM vaccination_record WHERE animal_id = #{animalId} ORDER BY admin_date DESC
SELECT * FROM vaccination_record WHERE vaccine_type = #{vaccineType} ORDER BY admin_date DESC
SELECT * FROM vaccination_record WHERE admin_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} ORDER BY admin_date DESC
SELECT * FROM vaccination_record WHERE next_due_date IS NOT NULL AND next_due_date <= CURDATE() ORDER BY next_due_date ASC
SELECT * FROM vaccination_record WHERE animal_id = #{animalId} ORDER BY admin_date DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM vaccination_record WHERE animal_id = #{animalId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM vaccination_record WHERE vaccine_type = #{vaccineType}
